title: yasha` #3467
definition:
1) to save, be saved, be delivered
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to be liberated, be saved, be delivered
        1a2) to be saved (in battle), be victorious
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to save, deliver
        1b2) to save from moral troubles
        1b3) to give victory to
